scripts.emulators:seed: npx -y firebase-tools@latest --config ../../firebase.json emulators:exec --project demo-capstone --only functions,firestore,storage,auth "npm run seed:emulator:reset"
scripts.emulators:smoke: npx -y firebase-tools@latest --config ../../firebase.json emulators:exec --project demo-capstone --only functions,firestore,storage,auth "node scripts/smokeCheck.js"
